title: Chibi Kaguya Totem
description: Animated chibi Kaguya totem of undying for Minecraft 1.16.2-1.21.11
body:
## About

**Chibi Kaguya Totem** is a resource pack that replaces the default Totem of Undying with a chibi Kaguya.  
It is made for Minecraft **Java Edition**.

## Features

* Custom high-resolution chibi Kaguya texture
* Animated
* Custom Totem of Undying activation sound
* Visual features are displayed in the screenshots and video showcase

## Requirements

* Minecraft **Java Edition** 1.16.2–1.21.11
* No mods required (Vanilla compatible)

> **Note:** Ensure all animations are enabled in the video settings for the pack to function correctly.

## Credits

* Textures, animation, and sound: **marblock**
